title: senecio rugegensis
intro: Senecio rugegensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the ragwort, which is native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs, and treat respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio rugegensis include its potential to reduce fever, ease digestive issues, and act as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Senecio rugegensis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
